seed_example: Given a themed grid network, remove at most k links to MAXIMIZE the increase in s-t shortest path; checker verifies budget + connectivity and scores the achieved delay ratio.
Place watchtowers on a forest graph to cover every cell within radius r, minimizing total cost; score = baseline_cost / achieved_cost.
Pack polyominoes into a W x H board maximizing covered area (score = 1e5*sum(k)/(W*H)), reflections allowed; checker validates no-overlap and in-bounds.
Choose which pickup-delivery pairs to serve and output one depot-to-depot tour minimizing distance; checker validates precedence + returns tour length ratio.
Emit a full machine schedule for a synthetic JSSP instance; checker validates precedence/no-overlap and scores min(100, 100*optimum/makespan).
Assign drones to delivery zones under per-drone capacity to maximize served weight; checker validates capacities and scores total value / baseline.
Build a connected relay network where no node has degree > 3, minimizing total cable length; checker validates connectivity+degree and scores baseline/cost.
Partition a weighted graph into two balanced halves maximizing cut weight; checker validates balance and scores cut/baseline.
Assign frequencies to transmitters minimizing total interference conflicts under a channel budget; checker scores baseline_conflicts/achieved.
Maximize total weight of satisfied clauses in a synthetic weighted CNF; checker computes satisfied weight / baseline.
Place 11 points in the unit triangle maximizing the minimum triangle area over all triples; verifier computes the min area exactly.
Emit a non-negative step sequence f; score c1 = 2n*max(conv(f,f))/sum(f)^2 to MINIMIZE (first autocorrelation inequality), vary n_steps.
Construct a 20x20 +/-1 matrix maximizing |det|/20^10; verify.py runs Bareiss exactly.
Construct an integer set A of size <=200 maximizing |A+A|/|A-A|; verifier computes both sumsets exactly.
Emit M points in [0,1]^d minimizing star discrepancy; verifier computes the discrepancy exactly over the induced boxes.
Given a fixed fishing-region instance, output a polygon selection scored by the official deterministic contest formula under a 1e7-operation budget enforced by the harness.
Emit a priority over F_3^n vectors; scaffold greedily builds a cap set (no 3 collinear); score = |set| for n=4..7 (small=fast reward, large=eval).
Evolve priority(item, bins) for online 1D bin packing; simulator places each arrival in the highest-priority valid bin; score = -mean(bins) as % over L1 bound across an instance family.
Place N circles in the unit square maximizing sum of radii (N=10..40); verify.py checks 1e-6 non-overlap+containment, score=sum(r).
Place 11 points in the unit triangle maximizing the minimum triangle area over all triples; verifier computes the min area exactly.
Emit a non-negative step sequence f; score c1 = 2n*max(conv(f,f))/sum(f)^2 to MINIMIZE (first autocorrelation inequality), vary n_steps.
Construct a 20x20 +/-1 matrix maximizing |det|/20^10; verify.py runs Bareiss exactly.
Construct an integer set A of size <=200 maximizing |A+A|/|A-A|; verifier computes both sumsets exactly.
Find a rank-R decomposition of the <3,3,3> matmul tensor over the rationals; counter verifies exact reconstruction and reports R (lower is better).
Emit M points in [0,1]^d minimizing star discrepancy; verifier computes the discrepancy exactly over the induced boxes.
Given a fixed fishing-region instance, output a polygon selection scored by the official deterministic contest formula under a 1e7-operation budget enforced by the harness.
Emit a priority over F_3^n vectors; scaffold greedily builds a cap set (no 3 collinear); score = |set| for n=4..7 (small=fast reward, large=eval).
Evolve priority(item, bins) for online 1D bin packing; simulator places each arrival in the highest-priority valid bin; score = -mean(bins) as % over L1 bound across an instance family.
Place N circles in the unit square maximizing sum of radii (N=10..40); verify.py checks 1e-6 non-overlap+containment, score=sum(r).
Place 11 points in the unit triangle maximizing the minimum triangle area over all triples; verifier computes the min area exactly.
Choose bar cross-sections for a 45-bar 2D truss minimizing weight subject to stress+displacement limits; evaluator runs the numpy FEM and returns weight-if-feasible.
Set safety-stock levels across a supply tree minimizing holding+shortage cost under a service-level constraint; evaluator computes the composite objective normalized to 100.
Design a phase mask maximizing diffraction efficiency + uniformity of a target spot array; evaluator simulates propagation with a fixed seed and returns the composite metric.
Emit a routing/transpilation for a QAOA circuit on the IBM Falcon coupling map minimizing added SWAP gates; counter checks equivalence and returns the SWAP count.
Given a (compute, loss) table, propose+fit a parametric scaling law; score = extrapolation error at held-out larger-compute points.
Propose a batch of query points on the DTLZ2 surface maximizing hypervolume under a 50-evaluation budget; evaluator computes hypervolume exactly.
Design a clustering algorithm scored by gmean(ARI) over blobs/moons/digits; evaluator recomputes ARI deterministically.
Emit a discrete causal-discovery routine scored by mean SHD over Cancer/Child/Alarm/Hailfinder graphs.
Design an optimizer update for a convex-concave saddle problem minimizing final gradient norm after a fixed iteration budget; evaluator recomputes the norm deterministically.
Design the training tweak for a tiny transformer on Dyck-matching; score = gmean(exact_match) on ID plus longer-OOD sequences.
